name: Shalmii
text: Selkie. Moonwake command marks your pursuit as an uncontrolled advance.

name: Selkie
text: Then your report is outdated. I know exactly why I am here.

name: Shalmii
text: To rescue Moon, or to avoid admitting that she may refuse you?

name: Selkie
text: To stand where she can refuse me and still know I stayed.

name: Shalmii
text: Acceptable words. I require proof under pressure.
